# services.technitium-dns-server

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.technitium-dns-server`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.technitium-dns-server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Technitium DNS Server. |
| `services.technitium-dns-server.firewallTCPPorts` | `list of signed integer` | List of TCP ports to open in firewall. You might want to open ports 443 and 853 if you intend to use DNS over HTTPS or DNS over TLS. |
| `services.technitium-dns-server.firewallUDPPorts` | `list of signed integer` | List of UDP ports to open in firewall. |
| `services.technitium-dns-server.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open ports in the firewall. Standard ports are 53 (UDP and TCP, for DNS), 5380 and 53443 (TCP, HTTP and HTTPS for web interface). Specify different or additional ports in options firewallUDPPorts and firewallTCPPorts if necessary. |
| `services.technitium-dns-server.package` | `package` | The technitium-dns-server package to use. |
